---
title: "Courses"
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---

I maintain several dedicated course sites covering various aspects of spatial data science, programming, and academic tools.

## 💻 Geospatial Programming

::: {.course-list}

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="images/agrimooc.jpg" class="course-thumbnail" alt="R Spatial">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i> R for Spatial Analysis</div>
<div class="course-description">Comprehensive guide to handling vector and raster data using R (*sf*, *terra*, *stars*).</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[R Programming]{.course-tag} [Spatial Data]{.course-tag} [GIS]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/rspatial/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="images/geeai.jpg" class="course-thumbnail" alt="GEE">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-cloud-sun"></i> Google Earth Engine</div>
<div class="course-description">Interactive guide and documentation for mastering cloud-based remote sensing.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[Earth Engine]{.course-tag} [Remote Sensing]{.course-tag} [Cloud Computing]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/gee/intro.html){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="https://placehold.co/400x250/34495e/ffffff?text=Python" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Python">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-hash"></i> Geo-Python</div>
<div class="course-description">Learning spatial data science with Python using *Geopandas*, *Rasterio*, and *Xarray*.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[Python]{.course-tag} [Data Science]{.course-tag} [Spatial Analysis]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/geopython/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

## 🚀 GIS & Spatial Reference

::: {.course-list}

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="images/Skills/arcpro.png" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Cloud GIS">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-cpu"></i> Cloud GIS & AI</div>
<div class="course-description">Resources on merging cloud computing with artificial intelligence for advanced GIS.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[Artificial Intelligence]{.course-tag} [Cloud GIS]{.course-tag} [Automation]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/cloudgis/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="https://placehold.co/400x250/e67e22/ffffff?text=Reference" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Reference">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-bookmarks"></i> Geospatial Reference</div>
<div class="course-description">A quick-reference guide for common geospatial operations in Python, R, and GEE.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[Reference Guide]{.course-tag} [Multi-Language]{.course-tag} [Cheat Sheet]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/geospatial/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

## ✍️ Academic Writing & Tools

::: {.course-list}

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="images/trainings.jpg" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Academic English">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i> English for Academics</div>
<div class="course-description">Essential resources for scientific writing, presentations, and clear academic communication.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[Academic Writing]{.course-tag} [English]{.course-tag} [Presentation]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/english/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="https://placehold.co/400x250/2c3e50/ffffff?text=LaTeX" class="course-thumbnail" alt="LaTeX">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> LaTeX for Geographers</div>
<div class="course-description">Professional document composition and high-quality thesis writing using LaTeX.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[LaTeX]{.course-tag} [Thesis Writing]{.course-tag} [Typography]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Visit Course](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/latex/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

:::

:::
